no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The bead asks to remove cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go's ModelRoute* compatibility methods after bumping cli/go.mod to a Fizeau release whose ServiceConfig interface no longer requires them, but the newest published github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau version available through Go and git tags is still v0.10.7. In this workspace, `go list -m -json github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau@latest` resolves to v0.10.7, `git ls-remote --tags https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` shows no tag newer than v0.10.7, and the v0.10.7 ServiceConfig in service.go still declares ModelRouteNames, ModelRouteCandidates, and ModelRouteConfig. Removing the methods here without a matching upstream interface bump would break compilation.
